g.text: Encoding: categorical fields use most-frequent imputation + one-hot encoding

rect.style: stroke-width: 1px; stroke: rgb(0, 0, 0); stroke-opacity: 0; fill: rgb(0, 0, 0); fill-opacity: 0;

text.style: font-family: Arial; font-size: 14px; fill: rgb(0, 0, 0); fill-opacity: 1; white-space: pre;

g.text: Numeric handling: pipeline uses median imputation; hidden fields use avg / p25 / p75 / mode / null scenarios in backtest

rect.style: stroke-width: 1px; stroke: rgb(0, 0, 0); stroke-opacity: 0; fill: rgb(0, 0, 0); fill-opacity: 0;

text.style: font-family: Arial; font-size: 14px; fill: rgb(0, 0, 0); fill-opacity: 1; white-space: pre;

g.text: Targets: main model uses time-rebased log price per sqm; extended backtest uses log resale price
